mapper.select: SELECT r.reservation_id AS reservationId, r.member_no AS memberNo, r.room_type_id AS roomTypeId, rt.fk_hotel_id AS hotelId, h.hotel_name AS hotelName, r.guest_count AS guestCount, r.checkin_date AS checkinDate, r.checkout_date AS checkoutDate, r.reservation_status AS reservationStatus FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON rt.room_type_id = r.room_type_id JOIN tbl_hotel h ON h.hotel_id = rt.fk_hotel_id WHERE r.reservation_id = #{reservationId}

SELECT t.timetable_id AS timetableId, t.fk_route_id AS fkRouteId, r.fk_hotel_id AS hotelId, r.route_type AS legType, r.route_name AS routeName, r.start_place_code AS placeCode, sp.place_name AS placeName, t.depart_time AS departTime, t.capacity AS capacity, ss.booked_qty AS bookedQty, (ss.capacity - ss.booked_qty) AS remaining FROM tbl_shuttle_timetable t JOIN tbl_shuttle_route r ON r.route_id = t.fk_route_id JOIN tbl_shuttle_place sp ON sp.place_code = r.start_place_code JOIN tbl_shuttle_slot_stock ss ON ss.fk_timetable_id = t.timetable_id AND ss.ride_date = TRUNC(#{rideDate}) WHERE r.fk_hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND r.route_type = #{legType} AND r.active_yn = 'Y' AND t.active_yn = 'Y' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tbl_shuttle_block b WHERE b.fk_hotel_id = r.fk_hotel_id AND b.fk_route_id = r.route_id AND b.active_yn = 'Y' AND TRUNC(#{rideDate}) BETWEEN b.block_start_date AND b.block_end_date AND ( b.fk_timetable_id IS NULL OR b.fk_timetable_id = t.timetable_id ) ) ORDER BY t.depart_time

SELECT shuttle_leg_id AS shuttleLegId, fk_shuttle_booking_id AS shuttleBookingId, fk_timetable_id AS timetableId, leg_type AS legType, ride_date AS rideDate, place_code AS placeCode, depart_time AS departTime, ticket_qty AS ticketQty, leg_status AS legStatus FROM tbl_shuttle_booking_leg WHERE fk_shuttle_booking_id = #{bookingId} AND leg_type = #{legType} AND leg_status = 'BOOKED' ORDER BY depart_time

SELECT shuttle_leg_id AS shuttleLegId, fk_shuttle_booking_id AS shuttleBookingId, fk_timetable_id AS timetableId, leg_type AS legType, ride_date AS rideDate, place_code AS placeCode, depart_time AS departTime, ticket_qty AS ticketQty, leg_status AS legStatus FROM tbl_shuttle_booking_leg WHERE fk_shuttle_booking_id = #{bookingId} AND fk_timetable_id = #{timetableId} AND ride_date = TRUNC(#{rideDate})

SELECT t.timetable_id AS timetableId, t.fk_route_id AS fkRouteId, r.fk_hotel_id AS hotelId, r.route_type AS legType, r.route_name AS routeName, r.start_place_code AS placeCode, sp.place_name AS placeName, t.depart_time AS departTime, t.capacity AS capacity FROM tbl_shuttle_timetable t JOIN tbl_shuttle_route r ON r.route_id = t.fk_route_id JOIN tbl_shuttle_place sp ON sp.place_code = r.start_place_code WHERE t.timetable_id = #{timetableId}

SELECT stock_id AS stockId, fk_timetable_id AS timetableId, ride_date AS rideDate, capacity AS capacity, booked_qty AS bookedQty FROM tbl_shuttle_slot_stock WHERE fk_timetable_id = #{timetableId} AND ride_date = TRUNC(#{rideDate}) FOR UPDATE

SELECT stock_id AS stockId, fk_timetable_id AS timetableId, ride_date AS rideDate, capacity AS capacity, booked_qty AS bookedQty FROM tbl_shuttle_slot_stock WHERE fk_timetable_id = #{timetableId} AND ride_date = TRUNC(#{rideDate})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_shuttle_booking ( shuttle_booking_id, fk_reservation_id, fk_hotel_id, fk_member_no, ride_date, status, created_at ) VALUES ( seq_tbl_shuttle_booking.NEXTVAL, #{reservationId}, #{hotelId}, #{memberNo}, #{rideDate}, 'BOOKED', SYSTIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO tbl_shuttle_booking_leg ( shuttle_leg_id, fk_shuttle_booking_id, fk_timetable_id, leg_type, place_code, depart_time, ticket_qty, leg_status, created_at, ride_date ) VALUES ( seq_tbl_shuttle_booking_leg.NEXTVAL, #{bookingId}, #{timetableId}, #{legType}, #{placeCode}, #{departTime}, #{ticketQty}, 'BOOKED', SYSTIMESTAMP, #{rideDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_shuttle_booking_leg SET ticket_qty = #{ticketQty}, leg_status = 'BOOKED', canceled_at = NULL WHERE shuttle_leg_id = #{shuttleLegId}
UPDATE tbl_shuttle_booking_leg SET leg_status = 'CANCELED', canceled_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE shuttle_leg_id = #{shuttleLegId} AND leg_status = 'BOOKED'
UPDATE tbl_shuttle_slot_stock SET booked_qty = booked_qty + #{qty}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE fk_timetable_id = #{timetableId} AND ride_date = TRUNC(#{rideDate})
UPDATE tbl_shuttle_slot_stock SET booked_qty = GREATEST(booked_qty - #{qty}, 0), updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE fk_timetable_id = #{timetableId} AND ride_date = TRUNC(#{rideDate})
UPDATE tbl_shuttle_booking SET status = 'BOOKED', canceled_at = NULL WHERE shuttle_booking_id = #{bookingId}
UPDATE tbl_shuttle_booking SET status = 'CANCELED', canceled_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE shuttle_booking_id = #{bookingId}
mapper.select: SELECT fk_reservation_id AS reservationId, shuttle_booking_id AS shuttleBookingId FROM vw_my_shuttle_reservation_card WHERE fk_member_no = #{memberNo} AND booking_status = 'BOOKED' ORDER BY shuttle_booking_id DESC

SELECT r.reservation_id AS reservationId, r.member_no AS memberNo, rt.fk_hotel_id AS hotelId, h.hotel_name AS hotelName, rt.room_name AS roomName, ri.image_url AS roomImageUrl, r.guest_count AS guestCount, r.checkin_date AS checkinDate, r.checkout_date AS checkoutDate, r.reservation_status AS reservationStatus FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON rt.room_type_id = r.room_type_id JOIN tbl_hotel h ON h.hotel_id = rt.fk_hotel_id LEFT JOIN room_image ri ON ri.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id AND ri.is_main = 'Y' WHERE r.reservation_id = #{reservationId}

SELECT shuttle_leg_id AS shuttleLegId, fk_shuttle_booking_id AS shuttleBookingId, fk_timetable_id AS timetableId, leg_type AS legType, ride_date AS rideDate, place_code AS placeCode, depart_time AS departTime, ticket_qty AS ticketQty, leg_status AS legStatus FROM tbl_shuttle_booking_leg WHERE fk_shuttle_booking_id = #{bookingId} AND leg_status = 'BOOKED' ORDER BY leg_type, depart_time

SELECT r.reservation_id AS reservationId, r.member_no AS memberNo, r.room_type_id AS roomTypeId, rt.fk_hotel_id AS hotelId, h.hotel_name AS hotelName, rt.room_name AS roomName, ri.image_url AS roomImageUrl, r.guest_count AS guestCount, r.checkin_date AS checkinDate, r.checkout_date AS checkoutDate, r.reservation_status AS reservationStatus FROM reservation r JOIN room_type rt ON rt.room_type_id = r.room_type_id JOIN tbl_hotel h ON h.hotel_id = rt.fk_hotel_id LEFT JOIN room_image ri ON ri.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id AND ri.is_main = 'Y' WHERE r.member_no = #{memberNo} AND r.reservation_status = 'CONFIRMED' OR r.reservation_status = 'CHECKED_IN' AND TRUNC(r.checkout_date) >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY r.checkin_date DESC, r.reservation_id DESC
